reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
⭐️하나는 노즈워크 하나는 장난감 set에요⭐️ 저는 노즈워크 2개인줄알았는데 아니었군요!
일반 노즈워크 패드는 먼지가 너무 붙고 부피가 커서 불편했는데, 위생적이고 컴팩트한데 다양하게 놀 수 있는게 뭐가 있을까 찾아보다가 발견했어요. 
이 수건 장난감은 난이도 조절이 가능하고, 미니미한데 구성이 알차서 완전 마음에 쏙 듭니다. 
핑크색은 찍찍이로 닫으면 난이도 최상이고, 작은데 노즈워크 구성 좋아요. 
파란색은 뽁뽁이 장난감이지만 반으로 접을 수 있어서 간편하게 노즈워크할 땨 쓰규 있어요. 

작아서 손세탁도 편하고 소형 강아지에게 찰떡입니닷
reviews.content_en: ⭐️One is a nose work pad and one is a toy set⭐️ I thought I was getting 2 nose work pads, but I was wrong! Regular nose work pads get dusty and are bulky, which is inconvenient. I was looking for something hygienic and compact that offers varied play options, and I found this! This towel toy is adjustable in difficulty level, and despite being minimal, it's packed with great features—I absolutely love it. The pink one has maximum difficulty when closed with velcro, and the nose work design is great for its size. The blue one is a crinkly toy but can be folded in half, so it's convenient to use for nose work. It's small so hand washing is easy, and it's perfect for small dogs!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
워낙 노즈워크 좋아하는 아기라서 환장합니당 
서비스로 주신 간식넣어줬더니 너무잘찾아먹어요
노즈워크 천위에서 사료도 먹고 간식도 먹거든요
하나라도 놓치지않으려곸ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 
사이즈는 작아도 그위에 손올리고 딱 먹기좋아요
reviews.content_en: My pup loves nose work so much, so she's obsessed with this! 😍 When I put the treats they included in the package, she finds them so well. She eats kibble and treats right on the nose work cloth, and she doesn't miss a single one hahahaha. Even though it's small, the size is just right for her to put her snout in and eat.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 좋아하는 장난감은 꼭 배고 자는데, 하루만에 저렇게 최애가 된걸 보니 사주길 잘했다는 생각이 드네요ㅎㅎㅎ 푹신푹신한데다 정말 수건처럼 보들보들 좋은 소재에 안쪽 노즈워크가 촘촘하게 잘 되어있어요. 푹신해서 터그놀이 하기도 좋아요
reviews.content_en: My pup hugs and sleeps with her favorite toys, and seeing how much she loves this after just one day makes me think I made the right choice buying it 😄 It's so soft and fluffy, made of really nice material that feels like an actual towel, and the nose work pockets inside are densely packed. It's so soft that it's also great for tug games!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 노즈워크를 좋아하는 울 댕댕이한테 최고의 선물 ..자기꺼신줄 알고 포장 뜯기전부터 난리네요..
reviews.content_en: The perfect gift for my pup who loves nose work.. She's going crazy even before I unwrap the packaging, knowing it's hers..

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 핑크2개 파랑2개 주문해서  선물도하고 강아지 노즈워크놀이해요 너무 조아해요 원단도 보들보들최고에요
reviews.content_en: I ordered 2 pink and 2 blue ones to give as gifts and for nose work play with my dog. I love them so much! The fabric is so soft and the quality is amazing!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 항상 발수건을 물고 다니고 양말,수건 등 천을 너무너무 좋아해서 광고 보자마자 겟!! 했습니다!! 삐삑 있는 거는 품절이라 이걸로 샀는데 역시나 바스락거리는 소리+수건광 아기들은 안좋아할 수가 없는 조합이에요! 자더라도 꼭 끼고 있어야하는 수건광.. 그리고 저희 애기는 신상이라면 다 좋아하고 잘 놀아서 언니의 통장은 텅장이 되어갑니다~~
reviews.content_en: My pup always carries around foot towels and loves fabric items like socks and towels so much that as soon as I saw the ad I got it!! The squeaky version was out of stock so I got this one instead, but it's such a perfect combo for fabric-loving babies—the crinkling sound + soft towel texture is irresistible! She has to snuggle with it even when sleeping.. And since my pup loves anything new, my wallet is getting emptier and emptier~~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
5개월 아기 강아지 킁킁 냄새 맡으며 너무 잘 가지고 놀아요🙂
노즈워크 제품들 세탁/세척이 어려운 게 많아서 구매할 때 늘 고민됐는데 이건 세탁도 용이해 보여 좋습니당
reviews.content_en: My 5-month-old puppy enjoys playing with it so much, sniffing and carrying it around 🙂 A lot of nose work products are hard to wash/clean, so I always worried before buying, but this one looks easy to wash so I'm happy!

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content: 아담하지만 곳곳에 숨길곳이 알차요. 소재도 좋고 작아서 세탁도 수월할것 같아요.
reviews.content_en: It's compact but has plenty of hidden spots throughout. The material is nice and since it's small, washing should be easy.

reviews.name: 공****
reviews.content:
삑삑이 장난감인데 노즈워크까지 되는거라 좋은거 같아요
입에 물고 다니기 딱 좋을거같아서 사봤어용
저희 애는 어떤 장난김이든 다 좋아해서 이것두 좋아할거같아요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's a squeaky toy that also works as nose work, so I think it's great! I bought it thinking it would be perfect for carrying in her mouth. My pup loves all kinds of toys so I think she'll love this one too hehe

reviews.name: Y****
reviews.content: 배송 빠르고 포장도 잘 하고 받았습니다~ 우리 아기가 노소 너무 좋아했어 이번 이벤트 진행되 바로 구입했어요 ^^
reviews.content_en: Fast shipping and great packaging~ My pup loved the nose work so much, so when this event came around I bought it right away ^^

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
수건과 노즈워크를 좋아하는 아이에게 아주 찰떡인 제품이에요!
보자마자 고민도 안하고 바로 장바구니에 담았습니다🥰
간식 넣는 칸도 넉넉해서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: This product is perfect for a pup who loves towels and nose work! 🥰 I didn't even hesitate and threw it straight into my cart. I also love that there's plenty of space for treats.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
파란색 수건 먼저샀는데 너무 잘가지고 놀아서
핑크도 샀어요 노즈워크라그런지 더 좋아하는거같아요
빨래가 쉬워서 너무 마음에 들어요
reviews.content_en: I bought the blue towel first and my pup loved playing with it so much, so I got the pink one too! Seems like they love it even more with the nose work feature. And it's so easy to wash - I'm really happy with it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 엄청 잘 갖고 놀아요 역시 새로운 장난감 !!! 노즈워크도 되서 일석이조입니다 쿠폰있을때 엄청 할인받아서 샀어요
reviews.content_en: They play with it SO much! A new toy like this is definitely a hit!!! Plus it doubles as nose work, so it's two benefits in one. Got a great discount with a coupon when I bought it.

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 장난감들이 다 특성이 있고 개성넘쳐서 좋아요. 저희 강아지가 너무 좋아하고 잘 물어뜯고 놀아요.
reviews.content_en: Each toy has its own personality and charm. My pup absolutely loves it, and they constantly chew and play with it.

reviews.name: H****
reviews.content: 출근할때 항상 종이에 싸서 주거나 공에 넣어주었는데 종이는종이를 먹을때도있고 공은 주머니안에 간식이 달라붙을때도 많아서 구매해봤습니다 울 강쥐가 좋아합니다
reviews.content_en: I used to wrap treats in paper or put them in a ball before heading to work, but the paper sometimes gets eaten and the snacks in the ball often stick to the inside of the pocket. So I decided to try this, and my pup loves it!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 칸도 많고 수건 같은 재질이라 세탁했을 때 빨리 마를것 같아요.
reviews.content_en: There are lots of pockets and it's made of towel-like material, so I think it'll dry quickly when washed.

reviews.name: 처****
reviews.content: 삑삑이와 노즈워크에 환장하는 강쥐에게 너무 신나는 장난감이에요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: For a pup obsessed with squeakers and nose work, this is such an exciting toy! ㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 선****
reviews.content: 오자마자 세탁해서 줬더니 잘물고 놀이방에서 노네요 ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I washed it right when it arrived and gave it to them, and now they're chewing on it and playing with it in the playroom ㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 수건 ㅜㅜ 엄청 귀여워여 좋아합니다 애기가
reviews.content_en: The towel design is SO cute ㅜㅜ My baby loves it!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 이곳을 파보시오 너무 귀여워요ㅠㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: Dig into this! It's way too cute ㅠㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 넘 귀여워요 ~~ 잘사용할게요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute!! I'll use it well~

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
노즈워크는 가장 쉬운 단계 같아요!
그치만 수건이 너무 귀여웠어요!
나중에는 살짝 접어서도 간식 넣어보고 응용해보려구요! :)
reviews.content_en:
The nose work seems like the easiest level!
But the towel was so adorable!
Later I'm planning to fold it a bit and try putting treats inside and experimenting with it! :)

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 2종세트로는 말리지가 않네요 하지만 잘 가지고 노내요
reviews.content_en: The 2-piece set doesn't dry well, but my pup plays with it nicely

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
노즈워크를 너무 좋아해서 노즈워크 장난감 사줬어요
수건 장난감이여서 부들부들 거려서 좋아요
살짝 냄새나서 베란다에 두고 날이 좋으면 세탁해서 주려구요
reviews.content_en:
My dog loves nose work so much that I got them a nose work toy
Since it's a towel toy, it makes a soft rustling sound which they love
It has a slight smell so I'm keeping it on the balcony and will wash it when the weather's nice

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 사이즈가 생각보단 작지만 노즈워크 구성이 잘되어있구 재질도 너무 좋아서 댕댕이들이 좋아해요 -!
reviews.content_en: The size is smaller than I expected but the nose work structure is really well designed and the material quality is so good that the doggies love it -!

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
울 푸들이가 삑삑이도 좋아하고 바스락도 좋아하고
수건도 좋아하는데 딱 안성마춤이네요
넘 잘 갖고 놀아요
바잇미 장난감은 실패한적이 없어요
최고에요~~!!!
reviews.content_en:
My poodle likes the squeakers, loves the crinkle sounds, and loves the towel too - it's perfect!
They play with it so much
I've never had a BITE ME toy fail
It's the best~~!!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 강아지가 수건이나 발매트를 좋아하는데 이 장난감으로 스트레스 해소하고 수건과 발매트에 집착이 줄어들면 좋겠네요^^ 삑삑이 9개 달려있어서 신나게 놀이할 수 있어 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: My dog loves towels and foot mats, so I'm hoping this toy will help them relieve stress and reduce their obsession with towels and mats ^^ With 9 squeakers on it, they can have a blast playing!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
배송 오자마자 실컷 갖고놀구 두번째 빨았어용ㅎㅎ
너무 잘 갖고놀아서 뿌듯합니당
reviews.content_en:
Right when it arrived they played with it like crazy and I've already washed it a second time hehe
I'm so proud they love it so much

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 원래도 수건끌고다니는걸 좋아해서 사봤는데 아니나 다를까 제일 좋아해요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: Since they originally loved dragging towels around, I decided to try this and sure enough, it's their absolute favorite lol

reviews.name: 행****
reviews.content: 삑삑이광공인데 주자마자 열심히 쥐어뜯네요 이틀만에 하나 성공햇어요 ㅎㅎ  하지만 아홉개나 있어서 마음이 넉넉해요 ㅋㅋㅋ 삑삑이 좋아하는 강아지들 진짜 강추
reviews.content_en: My pup is a squeaker fanatic and they immediately started shaking it vigorously - got one squeaker out in just two days hehe But there are nine of them so I'm not too worried lol Really highly recommend this for dogs that love squeakers

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 좋아용! ㅎㅎ 노즈워크 너무 좋아해서 신상나왓길래삽니다
reviews.content_en: Love it! 😄 My pup loves nose work toys so much, I got this new one!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 역시 👍 👍 👍 👍 👍 👍 👍 바잇미  아주 좋아해
reviews.content_en: As expected 👍 👍 👍 👍 👍 👍 👍 My dog really loves BITE ME

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 선물용으로 샀는데 너무 잘 쓰는거 같아요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I bought it as a gift and it seems like they're using it so well! ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 간식너어주니 넘 좋어해여 ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: When I give treats with it, my pup goes crazy for it! ㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content:
잘받았습니다
또주문할께요
reviews.content_en: Received it well. I'll order again!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 수건재질이라 보들보들 ~~ 구성도 알차고 좋아요
reviews.content_en: The towel material is so soft and fluffy ~~ The contents are well put together and I love it

reviews.name: 림****
reviews.content: 기여워요 굿 강뒤가 저아해요
reviews.content_en: So cute! Good quality. My Gangdoo loves it!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 빠른배송감사합니당~!
reviews.content_en: Thanks for the fast shipping!~

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 배송도 빠르고 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Fast shipping and great product!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 핑크2 블루1 샀는데요~ 블루보다는 핑크를 더좋아해요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I got 2 pinks and 1 blue~ My dog likes the pink better than the blue! ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 노즈워크 원체 좋아해서 ㅋㅋ 샘플 간식도 잘 먹일게요
reviews.content_en: She already loves nose work games lol 😄 I'll use the sample treats with it too

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 핑크2 블루1 샀는데 핑크를 더 좋아하네요~ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I bought 2 pink and 1 blue, but she likes the pink one more~ hehe

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 삑삑이보다 노즈워크를 더 좋아하네요
reviews.content_en: She likes the nose work toy more than the squeaky toy

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 노즈워크 장난감 새로 구매해봤어요!
reviews.content_en: I just bought a new nose work toy!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 재밌어하는 게 느껴져요 !
reviews.content_en: I can tell she's having fun with it!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 잘가지고놀아요!!!
reviews.content_en: She plays with it really well!!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 분홍이가 노즈워크고 이건 삑삑이인데 잘못구매해서 다시구입하려구요ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: Bunny has the nose work toy and this one is the squeaky toy, but I accidentally bought the wrong one so I'm planning to buy it again ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: Y****
reviews.content: 찍찍이 닫아놨더니 풀지못하ㅋㄱㄱ
reviews.content_en: I left the squeaky toy closed and she couldn't open it lol

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
가격대비...음..좀부실한감이 있네요..ㅜ
숨기는 공간도 너무 얇아 자꾸 빠져나오고ㅜ아쉽
reviews.content_en: For the price... hmm.. it feels a bit flimsy ㅜ The hiding spaces are too thin so treats keep falling out ㅜ It's disappointing

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
택배 받자마자 한시간도 안되서 벨크로 부분 뜯어진걸 발견.
아이가 먹은걸로 추정되고 다음날 구토로 병원에 입원 했습니다
reviews.content_en: Within an hour of receiving the delivery, I found the velcro part was torn off. I believe my pup ate it and the next day she had to be hospitalized due to vomiting.
